_meta.description: Honeypot trap endpoints that only bots parsing the DOM or following hidden links would discover. Humans never see these.
_meta.purpose: Detect and fingerprint aggressive bots, AI scrapers, and malicious crawlers that ignore robots.txt directives.

trapEndpoints.description: Fake user data export endpoint. Only bots looking for data leaks would call this.
Fake admin configuration endpoint. Only bots enumerating API paths would discover this.
Fake hidden sitemap. Only bots that parse JSON files looking for additional URLs would find this.
Fake recipe scraping endpoint. Only content-scraping bots would call this.
Fake private keys file. Only malicious bots searching for secrets would attempt to access this.

detectionRules.layer1: Hidden CSS link in HTML (display:none, tabindex=-1). Catches basic crawlers.
detectionRules.layer2: JavaScript-calculated link rendered only in DOM (not in source). Catches headless browsers and DOM parsers.
detectionRules.layer3: Fake API endpoints listed in this JSON file. Catches bots that enumerate data files looking for endpoints.

responseOnTrap.body: Bot trap triggered. Your request pattern has been logged.
